# AGENTS.md

## Commands

```bash
bun install              # install deps
bun --bun run build      # production build
bun --bun run format     # biome format
bun --bun run check      # biome check (lint + format)
```

**Note:** Use `bun --bun run` prefix (not just `bun run`) to ensure Bun runtime is used.

## Stack

- **Framework:** TanStack Start + TanStack Router (file-based routing in `src/routes/`)
- **Runtime:** Bun (Cloudflare Pages via Wrangler)
- **Lint/Format:** Biome
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS

## Order

Run `bun --bun run check` to catch style/type issues first.

## Generated Files

- `src/routeTree.gen.ts` - auto-generated by TanStack Router plugin (do not edit manually)
- run `bun --bun run dev` to regenerate routers

## Testing

Do not write unit tests
